children.text: The Chinese Writing System (Evolution and unification of characters)
Learning English (Forum posts on difficulties and advice)
The Book That Keeps on Growing (History of the Oxford English Dictionary)
Nouns: billion (十亿), system (系统), character (文字), calligraphy (书法), semester (学期), subway (地铁), apartment (公寓)
Verbs: refer (提到), base (以...为基础), carve (雕刻), appreciate (欣赏), struggle (奋斗), beg (乞求), demand (要求), relate (联系)
Phrases: refer to (指的是), ups and downs (兴衰), date back (追溯到), no matter (不论), make progress (取得进步), get used to (习惯于), give up (放弃), bridge the gap (消除隔阂)
Restrictive Relative Clauses with where, when, why (e.g. the country where Chinese developed)
Clauses with preposition + which/whom (e.g. bones and shells on which symbols were carved)
